name: Snail Mail Me
title: Snail Mail Me — Send Real Letters & Postcards Online
metaDescription: Send physical postcards and letters from your browser. Design your card, type your message, and we'll print, stamp, and mail it anywhere in the world.
metaKeywords: send postcard online, mail a letter online, send physical card, print and mail service
headline: Send a real letter from your browser
subheadline: Design a postcard or letter, type your message, and we'll print, stamp, and mail it to anyone in the world. Because some things are better on paper.
aboutContent:
The power of physical mail

In a world of instant messages and email, receiving a physical letter or postcard is special. Studies show that physical mail is opened 90% of the time, compared to 20-30% for email. It's tangible, personal, and memorable.

Perfect for

Thank you notes that actually get displayed on a fridge. Birthday cards when you forgot until the last minute. Travel postcards when you're too busy enjoying the trip. Love letters that can be kept in a drawer forever. Business thank-yous that stand out from the digital noise.

How it works

Choose a design or upload your own image. Write your message. Enter the recipient's address. We print your card on premium cardstock, add a stamp, and drop it in the mail within 1 business day. Delivery takes 3-7 days domestically, 7-14 days internationally.
disclaimer: SnailMailMe.com is a concept demo. In a full version, cards would be printed and mailed via a print-and-mail API.

items.name: Premium cardstock
items.description: Printed on thick, high-quality cardstock that feels great in your hands.

items.name: Worldwide delivery
items.description: Mail to any address in the world. We handle the stamps and postage.

items.name: Custom photos
items.description: Upload your own photos or choose from our curated design library.

items.name: Handwritten fonts
items.description: Messages are printed in fonts that look handwritten. Nobody has to know.

items.name: Scheduled sends
items.description: Schedule cards in advance for birthdays, anniversaries, and holidays.

items.name: No app needed
items.description: Everything happens in your browser. No downloads, no accounts required.

faqs.a: Postcards are $3.99 each, including printing, stamp, and domestic postage. International postage varies by destination.
Cards are printed and mailed within 1 business day. Domestic delivery typically takes 3-7 business days. International delivery takes 7-14 business days depending on the destination.

faqs.q: Can I upload my own design?
faqs.a: In a full version, yes. You'd be able to upload any image to use as your postcard front. We'd print it edge-to-edge on premium cardstock.
This is a concept demo — you can design a card and preview it, but it won't actually be printed or mailed. The full version would integrate with a print-and-mail API to handle physical delivery.
In the full version, we'd mail to any postal address in the world. We handle the correct postage for each destination country.
